This guide explains how to strip that location (Exif) data before sending, device by device, so your home address doesn't leak through social media or a shared file.

Windowsなら追加アプリなしで削除できます。画像ファイルを右クリック→「プロ: On Windows, no extra app is needed. Right-click the image file, choose "Properties", open the "Details" tab, and click "Remove Properties and Personal Information" at the bottom. Choose "Create a copy with all possible properties removed" and you get a copy stripped of Exif data, location included. The original stays untouched.
